title: deyeuxia pyramidalis var. ciliata
intro: Deyeuxia pyramidalis var. ciliata, commonly known as the dwarf grass or tufted grass, is a plant species in the Poaceae family native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deyeuxia pyramidalis var. ciliata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in modern herbal preparations for its potential health benefits.
